user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Priority: LOW
Category: Customer Success - Follow-up

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I'm just checking in on the ticket we resolved a few days ago regarding [briefly mention the issue, e.g., your login trouble]. 

It's been about 5 days, so I wanted to reach out and make sure everything is still working smoothly on your end. If you are running into any lingering hiccups or if you have any new questions, please just reply directly to this message and I'll be happy to help you out. 

If everything is good to go, there's no need to reply! 

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a follow-up draft, categorized it according to its instructions, and provided a professional, empathetic response that fulfilled the user's request.
